_comment: Copy to config/discord-channels.json and replace ids with Discord channel and role ids.

333333333333333333._comment: Introductions channel: bot replies only when mentioned and all features are available.
333333333333333333.name: introductions

444444444444444444._comment: Events channel: messages may be processed without mention, limited to event-related features.
444444444444444444.name: events
